race.comment: MIDNIGHT DYNAMITE (8) demolished his rivals in the LR Civic Stakes two-back over the 1400m at Randwick, then caught out on a limb with a game third over 1400m in the LR Winter Stakes at this track. Can race a touch closer on the good tempo. Top-three contender. WAR ETERNAL (3) iron horse who gets better as he gets deeper into the prep. Had to give Sun God 2.5kg last start when a game second in the LR Tatts Mile Qlty at Eagle Farm. Proven at the trip and expected to go close. GENERAL SALUTE (2) peaking at the right time and can keep the momentum going despite drawing out. Tempo suits and did finish runner-up in the LR Diamond Prelude over this trip last October. Sure to be thereabouts. COOL JAKEY (9) struggled to draw a decent gate at his last three outings and likely to roll forward again. Top-four player. SIR ARTIE (20) no shock to see him launching late on the limit.
